passing_score_scale: Two cut scores for TMC (low = CRT, high = CSE eligibility); pass/fail for CSE

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based exams administered at PSI testing centers nationwide. Schedule through PSI after NBRC eligibility is confirmed.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted at PSI test centers. TMC low-cut score awards the CRT credential; high-cut score qualifies candidate to attempt the CSE for the RRT credential. CRT credential remains valid until surrendered. RRT credential must be renewed every 5 years by earning 12 Continuing Education Credits (CECs).
renewal_options: CRT credential valid until surrendered; no renewal required. RRT credential must be renewed every 5 years by earning 12 Continuing Education Credits (CECs). Renewal administered through NBRC at nbrc.org.

retake_policy.notes: Candidates may retake exams as needed; refer to NBRC website for current retake scheduling restrictions and fees.

domains.name: Patient Management — Gathering Information and Developing a Plan

official_study_resources.title: NBRC Examination Detailed Content Outline
official_study_resources.notes: Detailed content outlines for both TMC and CSE available at nbrc.org
